feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: It's Lost Time.
entry.summary:
Author: jimhoppersfloralshirt

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,894Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: He wants to laugh because the elevator that’s supposed to be going up, has decided that with him in it, it doesn’t want to. It’s a twisted metaphor that his semi delirious mind conjures, and he knows that fundamentally he is not a bad person, but this twist of fate feels like a twist of a knife which feels like all his failings finally coming to a head.But there’s no use in laughing now, not when he can’t have the energy for it. OR: Eddie gets stabbed, stuck in the elevator, Buck finds him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: i wanna wake up next to you on a tuesday
entry.summary:
Author: fleetinghearts

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,640Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Eddie interrupts. “Well,” he says, turning fully to their waiter, “today’s kind of a special occasion, you see.”Sven smiles. “Someone’s birthday?” He looks between Buck and Eddie.“It’s actually, uh, our anniversary,” Eddie says, reaching out a hand to place over Buck’s.Buck chokes, even though all the bread is safely in the bread basket. or, buck wants a free tiramisu. eddie has a tried-and-tested plan to get it.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

  • of course it makes sense to pretend it's your anniversary when youre out with your best friend
  • eddie pov: we are having a normal time :)

entry.title: Different Town
entry.summary:
Author: Kiray

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,700Chapters: 1/39Kudos: 0

Summary: Post-military life as a single father in the city was demanding on a good day. When Eddie realised that his was no longer sustainable, he decided to switch gears completely. Had he ever imagined Christopher and himself in a place like Crescent Falls? Absolutely not. Yet, rediscovering his skills from long before the army, working as a ranch hand for someone called Bobby and meeting a guy named Buck... All of it sent him on a journey, that would end up rattling every aspect of his life. OR the one in which Eddie (closed off, repressed and zeroed in), gives up city life for a ranch in the middle of nowhere to provide for his son and finds way more than he was looking for.

entry.title: Don't Leave Without Me
entry.summary:
Author: itsbooelle

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,158Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 37

Summary: After Bobby's death, everyone is struggling. On a rainy shift, with everyone in their own particular bad moods, it seems to come to a head. When the road is washed out from under them, each member of the 118 has to face their own misgivings and misconceptions before they run out of time.

entry.title: Dinner For Two
entry.summary:
Author: j_marie_archie50

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,411Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: He stopped in front of apartment 417, taking a deep breath before knocking three times. The door swung open almost immediately. Eddie’s breath caught at the sight that greeted him. Buck stood in front of him wearing a pastel blue sweater that matched the blues of his eyes perfectly. His curls fell across his forehead in near perfect waves. Eddie wanted to run his fingers through them. The khaki slacks he wore fit just right, like they were specially made for him. “Hi,” Buck said softly, a little breathy. Eddie blinked, coming back to himself. “Hi." He grinned and held up the flowers. “These are for you.”   OR: Buck and Eddie go on their first date a couple of days after the dinner party.

entry.title: Built Around You
entry.summary:
Author: jve118

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 838Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 41

Summary: Buck finally has someone who needs him first, and for the first time in years, Eddie realizes what it feels like when Buck doesn’t automatically come home to them. As Theo settles into Buck’s life, the quiet distance growing between the Diaz apartment and Buck’s house begins exposing feelings neither of them were ready to name.

entry.title: Prince Naveen and his disciple
entry.summary:
Author: stargazingstormtrooper92

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,125Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 31

Summary: ‘’It’s true!’’ Theo turns to Ravi, eyes wide like saucers. ‘’You ARE Prince Naveen!’’ He then stands up from the floor holding a frog plushie in his hands. May tries holding her laughter while Ravi stutters. ‘’Um, no Theo. I’m Ravi, you know who I am,’’ Theo cocks his head like he’s thinking it over but then shakes his head. ‘’Are you sure?’’ (…) ‘’Yeah babe, are you sure about that?’’ May adds from the floor, snickering. Ravi levels her with his gaze. (…) ‘’And you’re princess Tiana! I knew it!’’ And now it’s Ravi’s time to snort out a laugh. ‘’You were saying?’’ He says to May over Theo’s head but she just rolls her eyes. ‘’Shut up, at least I’m not a frog.’’ ***Or: Ravi is a Theo whisperer, and probably a prince 👑🐸

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 256,516Chapters: 53/?Kudos: 117

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.title: Finding Those Lost
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 59,884Chapters: 15/24Kudos: 488

Summary: Evangaline ‘Buck’ Buckley has made a home for herself in LA. After the long and difficult path to get here, she doesn’t think there is much left to surprise her. She has a new family, her son is thriving, and she’s loving her work as a firefighter. So what if sometimes the dark still comes for her some nights?When a new firefighter starts at the station, everything Buck thought she knew is thrown up in the air as she tries to keep her past and private life together. Things only get worse when dispatch starts messing the whole station around. -+- A season 2 rewrite that won't make much sense unless you've read part 1. New chapter every Friday :)

entry.title: dead reckoning
entry.summary:
Author: sinnabonka

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,416Chapters: 2/12Kudos: 41

Summary: Buck steps closer, takes the knife from Eddie’s hand, the movement careful and gentle, and sets it aside. “Hey,” he tilts his head into Eddie’s line of sight. “It’s me. What’s going on?” “You know that thing that’s been going around, about the sun?” “The dimming thing? Eddie, that’s–” “It’s not,” he cuts him off right away. “The sun is losing output, we have data. And not gradually, not in a way that gives us centuries – we’re talking a decade. Two, tops.” Buck leans his hip against the counter beside him, crosses his arms over his chest. “…okay.” “There’s a team that’s been on it and they think they have a lead on a solution.” “Why are you telling me this?” “They need someone to go out there and retrieve whatever the thing is and bring it back.” “Eddie.” He doesn’t have to look, but he does anyway. He owes Buck that much. “It’s going to be a three person crew. A scientist, an engineer, and someone to fly the ship.” The silence sits around Eddie’s neck, drawing tighter with every second that passes. He can see the moment it lands. “And that someone is you.”Or, project Hail Mary AU. (Updated Mon Fri)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: I'll bring you home
entry.summary:
Author: CarpeDiem911

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,242Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 12

Summary: After a tragic accident leaves Connor and Kameron’s son orphaned, Buck struggles with what role he’s supposed to play in Theo’s life — and whether someone like him could ever be enough for a child. Before he and Eddie can figure any of that out, the 118 is called to an active hostage situation at a Los Angeles junior high school. What starts as another terrifying call quickly turns into every firefighter’s nightmare.

entry.summary:

entry.title: You're a Ghost
entry.summary:
Author: Little_Moon_33

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 47,704Chapters: 15/16Kudos: 58

Summary: "My memory is fine," Eddie snapped. "It's everyone else's memory that's fucked up." Rylen continued, ignoring the interruption, "we try to not offer too much information into their personal lives. Especially when that information can be harmful to the psyche." Ozwaldo opened the file, pulling out whatever was on top, offering it to Eddie. "Your Mr Buckley died, just about three years ago." -----AKA: What if the entire town gaslights (both accidentally and on purpose) Buck and Eddie that the other died in the 9x13 car crash.

entry.title: From elevators to promises of forever?
entry.summary:
Author: sourwolfdiaz

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,105Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 27

Summary: Evan has not left his mind since the moment Eddie left his house for the last time. He just wants to move on and start fresh. He wants to forget him, but after this long, after thinking about him daily ever since, Eddie knows he’s never going to forget him. Evan Buckley: the love of his life and the worst thing that's ever happened to him.   Or Eddie knew Buck, before he was 'Buck' and he ends up meeting him again in an unexpected place.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Oh, I love you and I can’t fake that for a moment
entry.summary:
Author: itzSmooches

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,896Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 245

Summary: “Only your kid, Buck.” Eddie smirked behind his beer. “Excuse me,” Buck squawked, “your kid has literally ubered to my place before without your knowledge.” There was a pause and before Buck could overthink it, Eddie shrugged, pressing his knee against Buck’s, “Okay, then. Only our kids.” Buck inhaled sharply and stared owlishly at Eddie before clearing his throat, looking away flustered. Our kids. His heart ached with a yearning he’s been trying to suppress since he realized what that feeling was. Eddie's straight. And a renter. He didn’t mean it in that way. Or Theo calls 911 for a playdate and Buck has a mini crisis over jumping to conclusions

entry.title: Trapped With This Love
entry.summary:
Author: Graceful_Ashes

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,563Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 55

Summary: Buck realises he has feelings for Eddie and begins avoiding him. Then they get trapped in a cave together and avoiding Eddie is no longer an option.
